article_title: Brewdog founder faces data complaints over efforts to buy back firm

tasks.prompt: What is the main subject of the article?
options: Complaints about how James Watt contacted former BrewDog shareholders during a buy-back effort
A new recipe launched by BrewDog in Scotland
A government ban on all crowdfunding investments
The closure of every brewery in the United Kingdom
tasks.correct_answer: Complaints about how James Watt contacted former BrewDog shareholders during a buy-back effort
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה עוסקת בתלונות על השימוש בפרטי קשר של בעלי מניות לשעבר במסגרת ניסיונו של ג'יימס ואט לקנות מחדש את BrewDog.

tasks.prompt: Which organisation said it was assessing information after receiving complaints?
tasks.explanation_hebrew: ה-ICO, גוף הפיקוח הבריטי על פרטיות ומידע, מסר שהוא בוחן את המידע שהתקבל בעקבות התלונות.

tasks.prompt: Which company bought BrewDog in the rescue deal mentioned in the article?
tasks.explanation_hebrew: לפי הכתבה, Tilray Brands רכשה את נכסי BrewDog במסגרת עסקת חילוץ.

tasks.prompt: What happened to many crowdfunding investors' BrewDog shares after the takeover?
options: They were converted into government bonds
They were automatically sold for cash
tasks.explanation_hebrew: העסקה הותירה את מניותיהם של משקיעי המימון ההמוני חסרות ערך.

tasks.prompt: In the article, what does 'tabled an offer' mean?
tasks.explanation_hebrew: בהקשר העסקי, tabled an offer פירושו הגיש הצעה רשמית.

tasks.prompt: Which sentence best summarizes the article?
options: BrewDog opened new bars after a record year
James Watt's attempt to regain BrewDog led to questions about how former shareholders' contact details were used
The UK government purchased BrewDog from Tilray
Former shareholders voted unanimously to reject all future offers
tasks.correct_answer: James Watt's attempt to regain BrewDog led to questions about how former shareholders' contact details were used
tasks.explanation_hebrew: זהו הסיכום המדויק: ניסיון הרכישה מחדש עורר תלונות וחששות בנוגע לשימוש במידע אישי.

tasks.prompt: Name two groups or organisations directly involved in the story.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש לציין שני גורמים רלוונטיים מתוך הכתבה, למשל ג'יימס ואט/Second Best, בעלי המניות לשעבר, Tilray Brands או ה-ICO.
expected_points: James Watt or his company Second Best
Former BrewDog shareholders or Equity Punks

tasks.prompt: Why did some former shareholders question the emails they received?
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש להסביר שהם לא הבינו כיצד פרטיהם הגיעו לידי השולח או שלא נתנו הסכמה לשימוש בהם לצורך הפנייה.
expected_points: They did not know how their contact details had been obtained
They questioned whether they had consented to this use of their data
The messages promoted a new buy-back or business proposal

tasks.prompt: Write a 2-3 sentence summary explaining the buy-back attempt and the data-privacy issue.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש לכלול את ניסיון ג'יימס ואט לרכוש מחדש את BrewDog, את הפנייה לבעלי מניות לשעבר ואת בדיקת התלונות על ידי גוף הפיקוח.
expected_points: James Watt sought to regain control of BrewDog
Former shareholders were contacted about the plan
Complaints raised questions about use of personal data
The ICO said it was assessing the information

tasks.prompt: Write a short response explaining why companies must be careful when using former customers' or shareholders' contact details.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש להתייחס להסכמה, למטרת איסוף המידע, לפרטיות ולצורך לעמוד בכללי הגנת מידע.
expected_points: Personal data should be used only for lawful and clear purposes
People may need to consent to marketing or new uses
Poor data handling can damage trust and lead to complaints
